mainText: Today's top stories: XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box, L’Oréal brings Maybelline virtual try-on to ChatG, Top spy agencies say AI cyber threats will, China Opens World’s First Wind-Powered Underwater Data Center, There’s Finally Video of a Great White Shark, Lindy ditched Claude entirely for Deepseek, saving millions, OpenAI launches Claude Mythos rival GPT-5.6 Sol, OpenAI's new flagship model GPT-5.6 Sol cheats
